name: vscode-hive
description: From Vibe Coding to Hive Coding - Review and approve AI-generated plans

viewsWelcome.contents:
No Hive nest found in this workspace.

[Init Hive Nest](command:hive.initNest)

This will create:
- GitHub agent files (.github/agents/)
- Prompt files (.github/prompts/)
- Copilot steering (.github/copilot-instructions.md)
- Agent skills (.github/skills/)
- Workflow hooks (.github/hooks/)
- Instructions (.github/instructions/)
- Plugin manifest (plugin.json)
- Claude skills (.claude/skills/)
- OpenCode skills (.opencode/skill/)

languageModelTools.name: hive_feature_create
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a new Hive feature for plan-first development. Use at the start of any new work to establish a planning workspace with context, plan, and task tracking.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a new Hive feature and initialize its planning workspace.

languageModelTools.name: hive_feature_complete
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Mark a feature as completed. Use when all tasks are done and the feature is ready for final integration. This is irreversible.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Mark a Hive feature as completed.

name.description: Feature name to mark as completed

languageModelTools.name: hive_plan_write
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Write or update the plan.md for a feature. Review context/overview.md first as the human-facing summary/history surface on this branch, while plan.md remains execution truth. Include a concise design summary before ## Tasks, and optionally include a Mermaid dependency or sequence overview in that pre-task summary only. Use markdown with ### numbered headers for tasks. Clears existing plan review comments when plan is rewritten.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Write or rewrite a feature plan.md file.

content.description: Plan content in markdown. Use ### 1. Task Name format for tasks.

languageModelTools.name: hive_plan_read
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the plan.md and related review comments for a feature. Use to inspect the plan.md execution contract, task structure, status, and review feedback while keeping context/overview.md as the human-facing summary/history surface on this branch.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Read a feature plan and its review comments.

languageModelTools.name: hive_plan_approve
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Approve a plan for execution. Use after reviewers have checked context/overview.md first, confirmed plan.md as the execution contract, and resolved any comments. Changes feature status to approved.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Approve a Hive feature plan for execution.

languageModelTools.name: hive_tasks_sync
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Generate tasks from approved plan.md by parsing ### numbered headers. Creates task folders with status.json. When refreshPending is true, rewrites pending plan tasks from current plan and deletes pending tasks removed from plan. Preserves manual tasks and tasks with execution history.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Generate or refresh Hive tasks from an approved plan.

refreshPending.description: When true, refresh pending plan tasks from current plan.md and delete removed pending tasks.

languageModelTools.name: hive_task_create
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a task manually, not from the plan. Use for ad-hoc work or tasks discovered during execution. Provide structured metadata for a useful spec.md and worker prompt.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a manual Hive task that is not sourced from the plan.

order.description: Optional order number for the task

description.description: What the worker needs to achieve

goal.description: Why this task exists and what done means

references.description: File paths or line ranges relevant to this task

dependsOn.description: Task folder names this task depends on (default: [] for no dependencies)

languageModelTools.name: hive_task_update
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Update a task status or add a work summary. Does NOT merge - use hive_merge for integration.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Update a Hive task status or summary.

languageModelTools.name: hive_worktree_start
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a git worktree for a pending or in-progress task. Use for normal task starts.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Create a worktree for a runnable Hive task.

languageModelTools.name: hive_worktree_create
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Resume a blocked task in its existing worktree. Requires continueFrom: 'blocked' and a decision.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Resume a blocked Hive task in its existing worktree.

decision.description: Answer to blocker question when continuing

languageModelTools.name: hive_worktree_commit
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Commit changes in worktree and mark task done. Does NOT merge - use hive_merge for that.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Commit changes in a Hive task worktree and mark the task done.

message.description: Optional git commit message; subject/body allowed. Empty uses default.

languageModelTools.name: hive_worktree_discard
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Discard all changes and remove worktree. Use when task approach is wrong and needs restart. This is destructive and irreversible.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Discard a Hive task worktree and reset the task to pending.

languageModelTools.name: hive_merge
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Merge a completed task branch into current branch. Supports merge, squash, or rebase strategies. Use after hive_worktree_commit to integrate changes.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Merge a completed Hive task branch into the current branch.

message.description: Optional merge commit message for merge/squash only. Empty uses default.

preserveConflicts.description: Keep merge conflict state intact instead of auto-aborting (default: false).

cleanup.description: Cleanup mode after a successful merge (default: none).

languageModelTools.name: hive_context_write
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Write a context file to store research findings, decisions, or reference material. System-known names are overview, draft, and execution-decisions. All other names remain durable free-form context while plan.md remains execution truth.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Write a Hive context markdown file.

languageModelTools.name: hive_status
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get comprehensive status of a feature including plan, tasks, and context. Returns JSON with all relevant state for resuming work.

feature.description: Feature name (optional, uses active feature if omitted)

languageModelTools.name: hive_agents_md
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Initialize, sync, or apply changes to AGENTS.md. init: scan codebase and generate. sync: propose updates from feature contexts. apply: write approved content.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Initialize, sync, or apply AGENTS.md content.

languageModelTools.name: hive_skill
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Load a skill by name. Returns the SKILL.md content with instructions for the specified workflow skill.
languageModelTools.userDescription: Load a Hive workflow skill file by name.
